item.title: Effects and Adaptation to Climate Change in the Venezuelan Amazon
item.description:
Organization: Instituto Venezolano de Investigaciones Científicas (IVIC), Centro de Ecología (October 2017 – January 2018)

Role: Professional in Training

Processing and analysis of satellite imagery, NDVI calculation, and geostatistical analysis to assess the effects of climate change and adaptation strategies in the Venezuelan Amazon ecosystem.
